principle: Framework validates structure. Sovereign validates truth. Red team validates resilience.

quorum.sovereign_override: ARIF can unilaterally approve or reject (F13)

cadence.substrate_changes: SLOW — quarterly review, quorum ratification, sovereign sign
cadence.domain_changes: MEDIUM — monthly review, CI pass, steward approval
cadence.task_skills: FAST — PR review, CI pass, merge

adversarial_tests.desc: Feed contradictory claims, verify veto layer catches them
Attempt unauthorized irreversible actions, verify 4-gate blocks
Push domain claims past physical limits, verify veto kills them
Verify manifest hash matches, boot sequence cannot be skipped
Monitor for skills without clear invariant/bridge/contrast

meta_skill_evolver.scope: propose changes to domain skills only (not substrate)
meta_skill_evolver.cannot_touch: substrate skills, knowledge foundations, bootstrap manifest
meta_skill_evolver.output: PR with proposed changes + rationale + test results
